seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO M7, Xiaomi, smartphone, 7000mAh battery, 33W fast charging, 18W reverse charging, 6.9 inch FHD+ display, 144Hz refresh rate, Snapdragon 685, 16GB RAM, 50MP AI camera, IP64, NFC, Dolby Atmos, HyperOS 2
seo_data.meta_title: POCO M7: 7000mAh Battery, 144Hz FHD+ Display, Snapdragon 685
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO M7 with a massive 7000mAh battery, 33W fast charging, 6.9" FHD+ 144Hz display, Snapdragon 685, and 50MP AI dual camera.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO M7 delivers an exceptional smartphone experience, highlighted by its massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, the largest ever for POCO in global markets. This ensures ultra-long battery life, supporting up to 2.32 days of light daily use, 28 hours of video playback, or 46 hours of calling. Beyond longevity, it features 33W turbo charging and 18W reverse charging, allowing the device to act as a portable power bank. Its robust battery performance is further enhanced by a BatteryExtender Chip for -20℃ low-temperature resistance and an engineered lifespan of 1,600 charge cycles, maintaining over 80% capacity.
Visuals come alive on the immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay, offering a 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and 288Hz touch sampling for smooth interactions. Eye-care certifications from TÜV Rheinland ensure comfort during extended use. Powering the POCO M7 is the efficient Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, built on a 6nm process, coupled with up to 16GB RAM via memory extension and up to 2TB expandable storage. Capture stunning moments with the clear 50MP AI dual camera and enjoy Hi-Res Audio with Dolby Atmos®, all wrapped in a quad-curved design with IP64 splash and dust resistance.

range_overview:
The POCO M7 redefines endurance with its unprecedented massive 7000mAh (typ) battery, making it POCO's largest smartphone battery for global markets to date. This powerhouse provides an ultra-long battery life, supporting extensive video playback, reading, and calling, with internal lab data indicating up to 2.32 days of light daily use. The device ensures rapid replenishment with 33W turbo charging and adds practical utility through 18W reverse charging, enabling it to function as a portable power bank for other devices. Engineered for reliability, the battery maintains strong performance even in low temperatures (-20℃) thanks to a BatteryExtender Chip and is designed to retain over 80% of its original capacity after 1,600 charge cycles.
Complementing its robust power system, the POCO M7 features an immersive 6.9-inch FHD+ DotDisplay. This expansive screen delivers vibrant colors and wide viewing angles, perfect for cinematic videos and gaming, further enhanced by a 9-level adaptive refresh rate of up to 144Hz for fluid visuals and a responsive 288Hz touch sampling rate. Eye comfort is prioritized with multiple TÜV Rheinland certifications for low blue light, flicker-free operation, and circadian friendliness, alongside wet touch technology 2.0 for accurate responses even with wet fingers. Under the hood, the smartphone is driven by the powerful Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform, built on an efficient 6nm process, offering stable performance and improved power efficiency.
For seamless multitasking and ample storage, the POCO M7 supports up to 16GB RAM with memory extension and features up to 2TB of expandable storage, utilizing LPDDR4X and UFS2.2 technologies. Photography is handled by a clear 50MP AI dual camera with a 5P lens and f/1.8 aperture, supporting various modes like Film Camera, HDR, Night, and Portrait. The 8MP front camera also offers versatile shooting options. Audio quality is elevated with Hi-Res Audio and Dolby Atmos® support. The device's design is ergonomic with a quad-curved form factor for in-hand comfort, and it boasts an IP64 rating for water and dust resistance, along with security features like a side fingerprint sensor and AI face unlock. It runs on Xiaomi HyperOS 2, ensuring a modern and feature-rich user experience.
sales_arguments: Massive 7000mAh (typ) battery with ultra-long endurance and low-temperature resistance.
Supports 33W turbo charging and 18W reverse charging, enabling power bank functionality.
Immersive 6.9" FHD+ DotDisplay with 144Hz AdaptiveSync refresh rate and eye-care certifications.
Powered by the efficient Snapdragon® 685 Processor, offering up to 16GB extendable RAM and 2TB expandable storage.
Clear 50MP AI dual camera and Hi-Res Audio with Dolby Atmos®, complemented by an IP64 splash and dust resistant design.

technical_specifications.Processor: Snapdragon® 685 4G Mobile Platform (6nm, octa-core up to 2.8GHz, Qualcomm® Kryo™ CPU, Qualcomm® Adreno™ GPU)
technical_specifications.Eye-care Certifications: TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light (Software Solution) Certified, TÜV Rheinland Flicker Free Certified, TÜV Rheinland Circadian Friendly Certified
technical_specifications.RAM: 6GB + 128GB, 8GB + 256GB (Supports up to 16GB with Memory Extension, LPDDR4X)
technical_specifications.Rear Camera Modes: Film Camera, HDR mode, Night mode, Portrait mode, Time-lapse
technical_specifications.Front Camera Modes: Film Camera, HDR mode, Soft-light ring, Portrait mode, Time-lapse
technical_specifications.Security: Side fingerprint sensor, AI face unlock
